title: COB Surface Light
description: The SL MX SF 1115 is a compact 15W square COB surface light powered by premium Bridgelux LED technology. It is designed to deliver efficient and uniform lighting, ideal for modern residential and commercial applications. Its sleek design and durable body finish make it perfect for ceiling-mounted installations.

details.Product Details: 15W surface-mounted COB light offering bright illumination with low power consumption.
details.Premium Construction: Sturdy body available in White and Black finish, designed to complement modern interiors.
details.Lighting Performance: Equipped with COB Bridgelux LED ensuring high brightness, energy efficiency, and long operational life.
details.Installation: Square fixture with size 80 x 80 x H70 mm, suitable for easy surface mounting.
details.Applications: Perfect for offices, living rooms, showrooms, retail spaces, and hospitality projects.

title: COB Surface Light
description: The SL MX SF 1130 is a powerful 30W square COB surface light with COB Bridgelux LED technology, designed for larger spaces that require strong and uniform illumination. Its stylish design and reliable build make it an excellent choice for both commercial and residential environments.

title: SMD Surface Light

title: Surface COB Downlight
description: The SL BY SF 1107-2 is a high-performance 14W surface-mounted COB downlight equipped with dual USA CREE LEDs (2x7W). Engineered to deliver reliable and bright illumination, this compact fixture combines efficiency with durability. Its sleek rectangular profile allows it to blend seamlessly into modern architectural designs while ensuring glare-free lighting for maximum visual comfort.

details.Product Details: This 14W rectangular surface COB downlight is built with dual USA CREE LED chips that offer powerful illumination with minimal power consumption.
details.Premium Construction: Designed with a strong and compact body, the fixture is available in both White and Black finishes, making it adaptable to a wide range of interiors.
details.Lighting Performance: It ensures high lumen output, superior CRI for natural color rendering, and long-lasting energy efficiency. The COB optics provide a soft yet bright beam ideal for both functional and decorative use.
details.Installation: Sized at 110 x 55 x 56 mm, this compact fixture is easy to surface-mount on ceilings without complex tools or modifications.
details.Applications: Perfect for retail stores, showrooms, offices, art displays, and residential interiors where a balance of modern aesthetics and powerful illumination is required.
